title: strychnos pubescens
intro: Strychnos pubescens, also known as the South African boxwood or poison tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Strychnos pubescens are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to exploit its medicinal properties.
